title: paepalanthus luteolus
intro: Paepalanthus luteolus, also known as the yellow Paepalanthus or yellow button plant, is a type of flowering plant native to the savannas and grasslands of South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Paepalanthus luteolus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in folk medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
